name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: China's coast guard ​"expelled" a Japanese ​fishing boat ​that intruded into its waters.

name: Solar (Solana中文社群)
fullText:
花旗、普华永道和 @solana 联合完成了一项贸易金融代币化概念验证（PoC）——供应商可发行代币化的付款凭证，以折扣价出售给银行，实现即时结算而非等待数月。

贸易融资是一个规模达 10 万亿美元的市场，传统金融巨头发出在 Solana 链上探索 RWA 真实世界资产的又一信号。 https://t.co/7NUNGcmM4Y

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: The U.S. has continued weapons shipments to Taiwan despite the Iran special military operation.
